Package
Description
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui
 
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels
 
  • Classes in nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels used by nonprofitbookkeeping.ui
    Class
    Description
    AccountTransactionDetailsPanelFX
    A JavaFX BorderPane that displays transaction details for a selected account within a specified date range.
    CompanySelectionPanelFX
    Lists the companies stored inside the shared database and allows the user to preview and open them.
  • Classes in nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels used by nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels
    Class
    Description
    CompanySelectionPanelFX.OnCompanyOpenedHandler
    Callback invoked when a company has been successfully opened.
    DashboardPanelFX
    A JavaFX BorderPane that serves as the main dashboard for displaying journal transactions.
    DonationsPanelFX.Donation
    Represents a single donation record.
    JournalEntryWorkspaceFX
    Shared workspace UI for creating or editing general journal entries.
    JournalEntryWorkspaceFX.Line
    Public row model so existing tests can reason about the table state.
